queries.question: Show all customers of either the currency exchange services founded in 2000 or the commodity trading firms that were founded at the same time.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.FullName
FROM Customers
WHERE (Customers.Organization = "Currency Exchange Service" OR Customers.Organization = "Commodity Trading Firm") AND Customers.Year_of_establishment = 2000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?customers p:Organization ?organization_w .
  ?customers p:Organization ?organization_w2 .
  ?customers p:Year_of_establishment ?year_of_establishment_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?organization_w) = "Currency Exchange Service" || STR(?organization_w2) = "Commodity Trading Firm")) && (STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "2000" || STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "2000.0")))
}

queries.question: Show the commodity trading firm customers from firms formed in 2000 and also show all the currency exchange service customers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customers.FullName
FROM Customers
WHERE Customers.Organization = "Currency Exchange Service" OR Customers.Organization = "Commodity Trading Firm" AND Customers.Year_of_establishment = 2000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?customers p:Organization ?organization_w .
  ?customers p:Organization ?organization_w2 .
  ?customers p:Year_of_establishment ?year_of_establishment_w .
  FILTER((STR(?organization_w) = "Currency Exchange Service" || (STR(?organization_w2) = "Commodity Trading Firm" && (STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "2000" || STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "2000.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all currency exchange service customers and commodity trading firm customers where the organisation was formed in 2000.
